info.title: Platform - Documents
info.description: The Documents API are used to integrate external systems and streamline the flow of data for documents in the OneTrust Platform.

hostname.description: The OneTrust hostname such as app.onetrust.com, app-eu.onetrust.com, app-de.onetrust.com, app-uk.onetrust.com, app-apac.onetrust.com, trial.onetrust.com, or uat.onetrust.com.

tags.name: Attachments
tags.description: The Attachments APIs are used to upload and obtain the location of files uploaded in the OneTrust Platform.

post.description:
Use this API to upload a file up to 64MB to the OneTrust Platform. The response will include the `Id` and `FileName` parameters, which can be used to attach the file to a product within the platform.

> 🗒 Things to Know
> 
> - The extension of the uploaded file must be in one of the supported file formats. For more information, see [Using the Document Repository](https://my.onetrust.com/s/article/UUID-24981513-4770-b8a1-b365-cc8b7fdb1712).
> - The `attachment` parameter below includes the following information: 
>   - `Parameters & Descriptions` contains details on the list of parameters and expected parameter values. This should be used for reference only.
>   - `Attachment JSON Object` contains the required format in which the parameters and parameter values must be sent in the request.

429.description:
Too Many Requests. 
For more information, see [API Rate Limits](https://developer.onetrust.com/onetrust/reference/rate-limits-overview).

schema.description: The number of seconds after which requests will be allowed again.
The unit of time for which the rate limit applies
The unique identifier for the rate-limiting event.
The number of requests made within the specified period.
The number of requests allowed within the specified period.

get.description: Use this API to obtain the location of an uploaded file. The location can be identified by the `downloadUrl` parameter included in the response.

parameters.name: attachmentId
parameters.description: The unique identifier of the uploaded file.

429.description:
Too Many Requests. 
For more information, see [API Rate Limits](https://developer.onetrust.com/onetrust/reference/rate-limits-overview).

schema.description: The number of seconds after which requests will be allowed again.
The unit of time for which the rate limit applies
The unique identifier for the rate-limiting event.
The number of requests made within the specified period.
The number of requests allowed within the specified period.

FileName.description: The name of the file, including its extension.

Name.description: The display name of the file.

RefIds.description: The unique identifier of the record associated with the attached file.

items.description: This needs to be a valid UUID. RefIds link files with entities. For e.g. To link a file with an assessment, use 'AssessmentId' as RefId.

Type.description: The number associated with the content type of the file, as listed within Show Details.

IsInternal.description: This flag indicates whether the file is marked for internal use.

Encrypt.description: This flag indicates whether the file should be encrypted.

file.description: The file to upload to the OneTrust Platform. The file must be 64MB or less.

Id.description: The unique identifier of the uploaded file.

Name.description: The display name of the file.

FileName.description: The name of the file, including its extension.

FileSize.description: The size of the file in bytes.

FileType.description: The type of file, based on its extension.

CreatedById.description: The unique identifier of the user who uploaded the file.

CreatedBy.description: The name of the user who uploaded the file.

CreatedDT.description: The date and time when the file was uploaded.

Type.description: The number associated with the content type of the file, as listed within Show Details.

RefId.description: The unique identifier of the record associated with the attached file.

IsInternal.description: This flag indicates whether the file is marked for internal use.

uploadParams.description: The details needed to access the file.

statusUrl.description: The URL to check the status of the request.

downloadUrl.description: The URL to download the file.

storageAccountName.description: The name of the storage account for the file.

containerName.description: The name of the container where the file is stored.

fileName.description: The name of the file in storage.

signature.description: The access token for the file.

scopes.ATTACHMENT: Grants access to view and manage attachments
